message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>" 1 ""

actor "Customer" as Customer #90EEF5 
participant Device #D3E6FF { } 

box "#87CEFA" ##DeviceProvisioningService\nProductIoTHub## FWProvider#Magenta{FW} Provider end box


== First start ==
note over ProductIoTHub : Device was registered for this product before 


activate Customer  
->> Device: Switch On/Power Up   
deactivate Customer  

loop Booting up    
    activate Device     
        ->> DPS: registerDevice(callback)        
            -->> Device: callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoThubURI, deviceId)       
                --> IoT Hub:setProperties                
                    ->>IoTHub: iamNewToYou(deviceId,fwversion)                    
                        opt Firmware needs to be updated                        
                            <-- FWP:updateFMandatory(URL)                            
                                ->>FWP: URL.get(OLDFW)                                
                                    <- - FWP: FW.Checksum                                    
                                        note right of Device: Downloading                                        
                                            self CheckChecksum                                            
                                                update                                                
                                                    Installing                                                    
                                                        restart                                                            
                                                            loop Booting up                                                                
                                                                send--> IoT hub:i am New To You(deviceld.firmware version )
